articles.title: AUTOPILOT
articles.summary: AI was meant to help you focus on strategy and creativity. Instead, it's devolved into a tedious chore of managing half a dozen GPT-wrapper tools. Ahrefs is doing things differently [4]. They built the world's #34 fastest supercomputer to power LLMs and enrich data - putting AI inside the product to power new and existing capabilities [4]:

articles.title: INTRODUCING GPT-5.2
articles.summary: OpenAI's GPT‑5.2 is optimized for professional use and long-term agent workflows. It improves performance across knowledge work, long-context reasoning, tool use, and multimodal understanding.

articles.title: DISNEY INVESTING $1 BILLION IN OPENAI, LICENSING CHARACTERS FOR SORA
articles.summary: A three-year licensing deal will let Sora and ChatGPT Image users create content with over 200 characters across Disney, Marvel, Pixar, and Star Wars starting next year.

articles.title: FAST MODEL LOADING
articles.summary: Tensor R-Fork is a zero-copy method for rapidly transferring model weights between running instances using GPU-to-GPU data transfer. It cuts loading time, reduces disk/DRAM usage, and keeps inference services uninterrupted.

articles.title: PROMPTS FOR OPEN PROBLEMS
articles.summary: This post proposes different research problems in machine learning research. The ideas include design-based machine learning, a theory of competitive testing, going beyond average case evaluation certainty equivalence in LLM reasoning, and open source, open corpus language models. The research areas are all doable, there just needs to be a will to do it.

articles.title: BUSINESS AI ADOPTION FLATLINES
articles.summary: AI adoption held flat for 45% of businesses in November, and there were slight declines in the finance and technology sectors. Adoption rose in several industries with relatively low adoption rates, like retail, construction, and manufacturing. The slowdown comes after a rapid run-up in adoption rates in 2025. The effects of the latest advancements seem to have faded. Another run-up in adoption will likely require technological gains or implementation gains.

articles.title: DON'T MISS ANY BUSINESS CALLS THIS HOLIDAY SEASON WITH VOICE ASSIST
articles.summary: Nearly 28% of business calls go unanswered, and during the holidays, that number climbs even higher. With CallRail's 24/7 AI assistant, Voice Assist [11], you can answer, capture, and qualify every call so you can keep business moving while your team enjoys time off with family and friends. Listen to Voice Assist [11] in action and try it

articles.title: CURSOR BROWSER VISUAL EDITOR
articles.summary: Cursor released a new visual editor that integrates design and code within the Cursor Browser. Users can drag UI elements, inspect props, and make changes interactively.

articles.title: BUILD WITH GEMINI DEEP RESEARCH
articles.summary: Gemini Deep Research is now available to developers via the new Interactions API. It is launching alongside DeepSearchQA, a benchmark for complex web search tasks. Gemini Deep Research is an agent optimized for running context gathering and synthesis tasks. It uses Gemini 3 Pro as its reasoning core. The agent autonomously navigates complex information landscapes with high accuracy by scaling multi-step reinforcement learning for search.

articles.title: LEARNING COLLATZ - THE MOTHER OF ALL RABBIT HOLES
articles.summary: The Collatz conjecture is one of the most famous unsolved problems in mathematics. It asks whether repeating two simple arithmetic operations will eventually transform every positive integer into 1. This article looks at what happens when a transformer is trained on the unsolved puzzle to study how models fail.

articles.title: 200K TOKENS IS PLENTY
articles.summary: Long context windows are overrated for agentic coding. Amp's team ships features using clusters of small threads averaging 80k tokens each rather than jamming everything into one million-token mega-thread.

articles.title: CHATGPT'S ‘ADULT MODE' IS COMING IN 2026
articles.summary: OpenAI's CEO of Applications recently told reporters that ChatGPT's 'adult mode' will debut during the first quarter of next year. The company had cut back on the chatbot's personality in response to growing concerns about user mental health. It has since added additional parental controls and new efforts to age-gate younger users. The company is still testing its age verification technology to ensure it can accurately identify teens and not misidentify adults before officially rolling out the split experience.

articles.title: BROADCOM REVEALS ITS MYSTERY $10 BILLION CUSTOMER IS ANTHROPIC
articles.summary: The customer Broadcom signed a $10 billion order for custom chips in September has been revealed to be Anthropic. Broadcom will deliver entire server racks to Anthropic, not just chips. Anthropic has placed an additional $11 billion order with Broadcom in the latest quarter. The deal has drawn significant investor attention amid the AI infrastructure boom.

articles.title: PLAYABLE VIDEO IS HERE: VEO 3.1 GAME GENERATOR
articles.summary: Creators are using a Veo-powered game generator to turn ordinary videos into playable mini-games. Early users get unlimited free generations.

articles.title: RUNWAY CLAIMS ITS GWM-1 “WORLD MODELS” CAN STAY COHERENT FOR MINUTES AT A TIME
articles.summary: Runway's GWM worlds offers an interface for digital environment exploration with real-time user input that affects the generation of coming frames.

articles.title: TRUMP SIGNS EXECUTIVE ORDER SEEKING TO BLOCK STATES FROM REGULATING AI COMPANIES
articles.summary: Trump created an AI Litigation Task Force to challenge “onerous” state AI regulations and potentially restrict federal funding to states with their own AI laws.

articles.title: CHINESE AI IN 2025, WRAPPED
articles.summary: A look at the biggest model drops of the year, China's evolving AGI discussion, the biggest swings in the US-China chip war, China's answer to the US' AI Action plan, and robots.

articles.title: GOOGLE TESTS GEMINI 3 FLASH MODEL ON LM ARENA
articles.summary: Google is actively testing two new models on LM Arena, suggesting a potential Gemini 3 Flash or Gemini 3 Pro general availability launch.
